summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that BDX is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $153.0. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 57.1%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $158.37 and a significant trendline confluence around $156.42 (formed by 6 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
